name: The Golf Studio
about: The Golf Studio is a private, member-only golf simulator facility located in Elkhorn, Nebraska, offering year-round access for Omaha golfers. The venue features two Full Swing Pro 2.0 simulator bays equipped with infrared technology and high-speed blue light LED cameras to provide realistic shot tracking and instant swing feedback. Members enjoy unlimited use and can book sessions through a mobile portal, with access to a variety of prestigious golf courses and interactive practice ranges for game improvement. With limited memberships issued on an individual basis to ensure availability, the studio combines a modern clubhouse environment with advanced technology to create an accessible training space for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to state-of-the-art Full Swing Pro 2.0 simulators
Unlimited simulator use with instant swing feedback and data analytics
Private member-only facility ensuring availability and a focused environment

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB likely but not confirmed
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB likely but not confirmed

simulator_hardware.notes: Uses infrared technology, high-speed blue light LED cameras, and ION3 Overhead Camera for clubface impact recording

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention food or drink service; BYOB policy is not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but simulators allow for full rounds on various courses.

faq.question: Is The Golf Studio kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, The Golf Studio is a private, member-only facility with no specific offerings for children.
